mano_cua.result_summary: 同org-chart-69/215：tree.html依赖d3.csv API（D3 v7已移除）和本地build/d3-org-chart.js，chart对象未能初始化（TypeError: d3.OrgChart is not a constructor），组织架构图完全无法渲染。所有交互按钮失效。无法测试目标功能
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Same root cause as org-chart-69 and org-chart-215. tree.html at buggy commit c8ebb04 depends on d3.csv (removed in D3 v7) and local build of d3-org-chart.js. Chart object never initializes. All interactive features (expand/collapse, layout swap, export) non-functional. Cannot test target functionality.
